flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tufts University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.0k → $70.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tufts University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.0k → $70.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tufts University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).
